h2: Save up to $650 now through May 1, 2026, when you convert your wood-burning fireplace to a gas insert. It installs right into your existing space for instant, hassle-free warmth and cozy comfort at the push of a button.
Steps to Plan Your Fireplace Makeover with a Gas Insert

paragraphs: Save up to $650 now through May 1, 2026, when you convert your wood-burning fireplace to a gas insert. It installs right into your existing space for instant, hassle-free warmth and cozy comfort at the push of a button.

Transform your home with our top-of-the-line Escape gas fireplace insert. The biggest, clearest view of the fire, hand-painted logs and efficient heating take your fireplace from unused to unbelievable. Available in 30 and 35-inch widths.

Bring home the look of a wood fire – without the hassle. The SupremeX gas insert features flames that wrap around hand-painted logs, creating a natural, cozy glow enhanced by an LED ember bed. Designed to maximize your fireplace opening, this insert offers a large and immersive fireside experience. And with design options to fit your aesthetic, it’ll feel like it was always part of your home. Available in 30-inch width.

With big flames and classic style, the Supreme gas fireplace insert gives your old, cold fireplace a beautiful makeover. Choose from the widest variety of logs and interior styles to get the look you love. Gathering around a roaring fire has never been easier thanks to this low-maintenance fireplace insert. Available in 25, 30 and 35-inch widths.

Match your modern design style with the Cosmo gas insert. It fits directly inside your outdated, wood-burning firebox, turning an unusable fireplace into an efficient, easy-to-use gas fire. No more hassle, only pure fireplace enjoyment. Available in 30 and 35-inch widths.

Restore the beauty and functionality of your fireplace with the Provident. This gas fireplace insert helps heat your home efficiently and provides a natural gathering space, all with the touch of a button. Available in 30 and 35-inch widths.

Convert a drafty, dated fireplace into an eco-friendly, efficient source of warmth with an electric fireplace insert. The electric insert fits directly into a wood fireplace opening with a surround kit or any framed opening with the self-trimming design. Available in 25-inch, 30-inch and 35-inch insert widths.
This step-by-step guide walks you through the key decisions, from measuring your existing fireplace to choosing the right style, so you can plan with confidence.
Whether you're updating your current fireplace or adding one to your home, our authorized dealers can show you a range of options that fit your style and budget.

Please refer to the owner’s/installation manual for complete requirements, specifications, testing and listing information. The heat output as well as the appearance of your unit in your specific application—including the flame, embers and overall product appearance—may vary for a variety of reasons from the data and images presented. Product specifications and pricing are subject to change without notice, and installation must adhere strictly to instructions shipped with product. Hearth & Home Technologies reserves the right to update units periodically. If you need help in determining the product that best suits your needs, please see your local authorized dealer.
